reasoning: Solana reached its all-time high of approximately $294 on January 19, 2025, which falls outside the start of the resolution window (Jan 21, 12:00 ET). Since then, it has been in a substantial downtrend, and is currently trading around $125-$140 in mid-March. To resolve YES, SOLUSDT on Binance would need to print a new all-time high above the January 19 peak before March 31. This would require an increase of over 100-130% from current levels within roughly 15 days. Given Solana's large market cap, a move of this magnitude in such a short timeframe is exceptionally unlikely without an unprecedented bullish catalyst. The Polymarket price was already down to 0.04 by March 6 when the price was higher, and the continued decline reinforces a minimal probability of achieving a new ATH by the end of March.
